cards.back: Living components of the environment such as plants, animals, fungi, and microorganisms.
Non-living components of the environment such as water, soil, sunlight, and temperature.
The non-living components of the environment including land, water, air, and minerals.
The interactions and changes in the chemical composition of the environment including air, water, and soil.
The continuous movement of chemical elements and compounds between the biosphere, lithosphere, and hydrosphere.
